summary: Smart Money Vault — an institutional trading command center on ICP. Single Motoko canister (backend/main.mo) with React frontend. Features: user profiles, bot profiles, audit log, uplink kill-switch, HTTPS outcalls, Stripe payments/subscriptions, Ed25519 signature verification, stable storage with upgrade hooks. React frontend uses Cupertino Quant design (charcoal + emerald, glassmorphism). Admin principals are hardcoded; user gyojt-gsv7l-g3oqx-3m7xb-w7cmh-nck6r-so6sn-fc7jp-ymofr-fgq6n-eae needs to be added as admin.
architectural_notes: Single Motoko canister (backend/main.mo) with React frontend; keep files under 1000 lines
All mutations must be update calls, never query calls
Stable variables with pre/post-upgrade hooks for all maps (userProfiles, trades, botProfiles, auditLog, analyticsEvents, usedNonces, subscriptionTiers, botIdIndex)
Ed25519 signature verification via tweetnacl for bot requests; check_uplink rejects unsigned calls
Stripe uses mode=subscription with price_id; webhook handles invoice.paid and customer.subscription.deleted
Do not modify: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui/*
Access control: AccessControl.hasPermission for user checks, AccessControl.isAdmin for admin checks

new_feature_requests.summary: Add the principal `gyojt-gsv7l-g3oqx-3m7xb-w7cmh-nck6r-so6sn-fc7jp-ymofr-fgq6n-eae` to the hardcoded admin principals list in the backend so that `AccessControl.isAdmin` returns true for this user.
